title: Nami Faces Enel
description: Sanji and Usopp risk themselves against Enel’s overwhelming power, buying time even when victory seems impossible.
scene: Across pages 0, 1, 2, 3, this scene centers on Enel, Nami, Nola, Sanji, Usopp. Sanji and Usopp risk themselves against Enel’s overwhelming power, buying time even when victory seems impossible.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: followed me all the way here.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: No need to hold back this time!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: This stupid cave sure is weird!!!

summary: Sanji and Usopp risk themselves against Enel’s overwhelming power, buying time even when victory seems impossible.
